content-desc: Map of Flea market Porte de Montreuil

children.text: Avenue du Professeur André Lemierre, 75020 Paris, France

Very lively place in the morning in between 2 metro stations. Cheap bargains for bundled items. Heaven for handyman n  like me.  Recycling center next to busy ring road. Near to my hotel in Galieni Paris.

The shopping here was pretty bad, either cheap and new clothing, or old and ratty things.  Most stalls was really challenging to navigate, and we didn't find any good shopping.  There was, however, an amazing food stand we found which means the trip wasn't totally worthless.  These guys did great food with smiles.
Here is full of cheap goods, new and used same as a Saturday market. You can be a found interesting things
Don't buy electronics here ever they won't last,at times merchants here have nice cargo but always remember to bid their prices lol
should have bargaining skill before visiting this market
